name: I'm scared talking to the insurance adjuster after my Salt Lake City injury—what should I say?
description: Basics only; get lawyer before details.[2]

mainEntity.name: I'm scared talking to the insurance adjuster after my Salt Lake City injury—what should I say?

acceptedAnswer.text: Basics only; get lawyer before details.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Say little—provide basic facts, no details or recorded statements without advice.** They minimize claims.[2] Key factors: Get everything in writing; lawyer handles. Request forms first. Silence protects your payout.
